name: Curry Delight
recipeInstructions:
Cook the meat and onion in a Dutch oven until the meat is brown. Remove excess fat.
Add the tomatoes (undrained) and remaining ingredients except peanuts, breaking up tomatoes when added.
Bring to boil, then reduce heat and simmer covered, stirring occasionally, until rice is tender (about 30-45 minutes). Add water if necessary.
Garnish with chopped peanuts before serving.
To serve in oven: Transfer mixture to ungreased 3-quart casserole. Cover and bake at 350°F, stirring occasionally until rice is tender (about 45-55 minutes). Garnish with peanuts before serving.
